title: Betrayal and Salvation
overview: Light dreams of becoming an adventurer, but his skill produces nothing but junk.

title: The Abyss
overview: Years later, Light has built a new life surrounded by new friends and powerful allies. All are loyal to him in their own way, and all are eager to help him with his revenge.

title: The Lord of Destruction
overview: Garou is living the high life: wealth, power, respect. He has it all. Little does he know that his world is about to come crashing down when a maid comes asking for his help.

title: Adventurers
overview: Light has the power to conquer the surface world, but only a fool rushes into battle. Instead, he poses as an adventurer to gather intel on the nations that will oppose him.

title: A Small Wish
overview: While Elio and his friend watch in shock as Light's party fights a powerful monster, Kyto and Yanaaq attack humans as part of a horrific experiment.

title: The Adventurer Killer
overview: Light hunts an Adventurer Killer to climb the ranks, but he doesn't have any leads. Until a badly injured Miya teleports into his room.

title: Thank You
overview: Kyto and Yanaaq will pay for what they’ve done.

title: White Knights
overview: Light won't let Sasha have a happy-ever-after. She doesn't deserve one after what she did to him.

title: Kick Off
overview: Light's plan against Sasha is underway. But if he's going up against the might of the elves, he's going to need backup.

title: The Tower War
overview: Light's strategy against the White Knights is divide and conquer.

title: God Requiem Gungnir
overview: Light's long-awaited battle with Sasha finally begins.

title: Towards a New Path
overview: In the end, every guilty soul must reap the whirlwind.
